hero.definition: Woori Smart Bio is a green bio company standardizing functional botanical materials on a data-driven precision smart farm.
hero.subhead: MAT lifts active compounds consistently so every batch ships the same quality of material.

personas.heading: Jump straight to what matters to you

MAT cultivation and precision smart farm solutions
Market opportunity, growth roadmap, IP and infrastructure

items.label: STATUS
items.caption: Venture company and corporate R&D center (2024)

scale.heading: Data is proven at scale
scale.lede: The precision smart farm and research infrastructure at our Yeoncheon R&D production center produce functional botanical materials under identical conditions, 365 days a year.

problem.heading:
Botanicals shut out by the wall of standardization
A $45B botanical drug market awaits the answer

problem.label: PROBLEM
problem.title: Botanicals resist standardization
problem.body: Field and greenhouse cultivation expose plants to uncontrollable variables. Climate, soil, harvest season, and pesticide exposure all shift active compound content from one harvest to the next. Pharmaceutical-grade standardization is effectively impossible.

opportunity.label: OPPORTUNITY
opportunity.title: $45B botanical drug market
opportunity.body: The FDA-aligned global botanical drug market grows from $45B in 2024 to $81B by 2033. Market entry has one prerequisite. A standardized API supply.
opportunity.source: Source · global botanical drug market estimate (2024) · approx ₩60T → ₩108T at 1,333 KRW/USD

mat.heading:
MAT
We trigger the plant's own defense
to surface active compounds on purpose
mat.plain: In plain terms, MAT precisely controls light, temperature, water, and minerals to guide plants toward producing more active compounds, more consistently.
mat.value: So every batch can ship the same active-compound content, reliably.

diagram.note: Basis · in-house trial vs. same-cultivar control

mat.body: MAT (Metabolite Agriculture Technology) targets active compound yield rather than biomass growth. Specific UV-B wavelengths, brief thermal shocks, regulated water deficit, and mineral cues are applied as precision stressors to induce secondary metabolite production.

stressors.label: STRESSOR 01
stressors.title: UV-B Light
stressors.caption: Targeted wavelength induces secondary metabolite synthesis
stressors.tooltip: Secondary metabolites are the functional compounds a plant makes to defend itself. A specific UV wavelength induces their synthesis.

stressors.label: STRESSOR 02
stressors.title: Thermal Shock
stressors.caption: Short heat and cold pulses trigger defense pathways
stressors.tooltip: Brief, sharp temperature swings stress the plant and wake its defense pathways.

stressors.label: STRESSOR 03
stressors.title: Water Deficit
stressors.caption: Controlled drought stress without compromising survival
stressors.tooltip: Water supply is deliberately reduced to induce drought stress.

stressors.label: STRESSOR 04
stressors.title: Mineral Cue
stressors.caption: Specific nutrient blends activate biosynthesis routes
stressors.tooltip: EC measures nutrient concentration in the solution. Specific blends activate biosynthesis routes.

fda.heading:
The FDA's five guidelines
WSB is structured to address the core production requirements
fda.lede: The five core requirements the FDA applies to botanical drug approval. Conventional cultivation struggles to address them at the same time. WSB's precision-controlled smart farm and MAT are structured around raw-material identity, records, contaminant control, quality consistency, and long-term supply stability.

rows.wsb: Only genetically validated seeds. DNA marker verification of identity
Digital SOP controls every environmental variable. Every step recorded as data
Closed-type fully isolated facility. Heavy metals, pesticides, and microbes blocked at source
Active compound consistency across batches. Chemical fingerprint database built
365-day identical-condition production. Long-term supply stability data secured

fda.disclaimer: This matrix shows FDA guideline alignment, not FDA approval or certification. Certification and approval follow a separate process.

traction.heading:
Backed by data
Supported by production scale
traction.lede: MAT and the precision-controlled smart farm show active-compound gains and batch consistency with data. The Yeoncheon R&D production center's capacity and our clinical material supply record back it up.

saponin.label: SAPONIN ↑
saponin.caption: Ginsenoside content vs. control group
saponin.source: WSB internal analysis · same-cultivar control · HPLC

batch.label: BATCH VARIATION
batch.caption: Across all key compounds batch to batch

traction.label: ANNUAL CAPACITY
traction.caption: Annual production capacity, Yeoncheon R&D production center (per plant)

traction.networkNote: We collaborate with partners across solution, material, and brand lines in Korea and abroad. Confirmed contracts and milestones are announced through News as they become public.

business.heading:
Technology · Material · Brand
A three-pillar vertical stack
business.lede: The same MAT and precision-controlled smart farm power three businesses: solution sales, material supply, and a direct-to-consumer brand.

pillars.label: PILLAR 01
pillars.title: B2B Solution
pillars.subtitle: Technology as a product
pillars.body: MAT digital cultivation recipes, precision control software, and the controlled-environment hardware stack are sold as one integrated solution. We close the technology gap for our customers in a single deal.
pillars.metricCaption: Recipe, control software, and facility as one

pillars.label: PILLAR 02
pillars.title: B2B Material
pillars.subtitle: Standardized API supply
pillars.body: We produce and supply materials designed to address cGMP requirements, from API-oriented botanical materials to high-potency nutraceutical ingredients and efficacy-verified cosmetic botanicals. A stable supply and revenue base.

pillars.label: PILLAR 03
pillars.title: Phytopresso
pillars.subtitle: Validating value as a brand
pillars.body: A high-concentration brand of natural functional compounds. A premium healthcare lineup on hydroponic ginseng that validates our material in the consumer market.
pillars.metricCaption: Hydroponic Ginseng SHOT · Angelica DECURSIN · Dendropanax CGA
cases: B2C distribution outsourced to an influencer-marketing specialist

ctaProof.heading: Seen the proof? It's time to talk partnership
ctaProof.body: Material supply, technology solutions, clinical collaboration, and more. We respond within two business days.

ctaRnd.heading: We're looking for partners to develop new materials
ctaRnd.body: Botanical API standardization, clinical material supply, and technical data requests.

pipeline.heading: Six botanical pipelines on the same platform
pipeline.lede: Each new plant species adds a new material on top of the same precision-controlled smart farm and MAT stack. Ginseng is commercial. Isatis and Angelica are at pre-launch. Three more are in R&D.
pipeline.disclaimer: Indications are research targets and do not represent confirmed efficacy. Items beyond the commercial stage are under development.

news.heading: Latest updates
news.lede: Contracts, clinical material supply, certifications, and media coverage from WSB's operating pipeline.

roadmap.heading:
Phase 1 foundation
Phase 2 expansion
Phase 3 standard
roadmap.lede: FDA guideline alignment and Korean traction in Phase 1. Global expansion and cGMP scale-up in Phase 2. Evolution into a botanical data platform in Phase 3.

phases.label: PHASE 01
phases.title: Foundation and validation
bullets: GACP certification and FDA botanical-drug guideline alignment
Lead the Korean B2B high-potency botanical material market
Commercialize three or more pipelines beyond ginseng

phases.label: PHASE 02
phases.title: Global expansion and scale-up
bullets: Full-scale export of MAT-AI smart farm solutions
Registered FDA botanical drug API supplier

phases.label: PHASE 03
phases.title: Market leadership and standards
bullets: Core API supplier in the global botanical drug market
Botanical data platform built on proprietary cultivation and bioactive data
AI-driven new-material discovery and personalized healthcare
